modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help copying emails to a new account

full_description_text:  
The user wants to have a copy of their emails. They asked if we can transfer their emails to a new account. It seems like they need help with getting their emails backed up or exported.
short_description: Need help copying emails to a new account
description: The user wants to have a copy of their emails. They asked if we can transfer their emails to a new account. It seems like they need help with getting their emails backed up or exported.
